Class ShieldCounter

java.lang.Object
Model.Ship.ShieldCounter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class ShieldCounter extends Object implements Serializable, Cloneable
ShieldCounter keeps track of the number of shields on each side of a ship. It provides methods to increment and decrement the counts, ensuring they do not go below zero.
See Also:
